## Problem

What are you trying to do that's hard or impossible today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about.

## Notes

Keep in mind SmartBrain is **local-first and single-user** — no cloud, no domain,
and no required third-party SaaS at runtime. Features should fit that model.
